overview: A modern, trust-driven real estate landing website for Hari Om Real Estate & Properties — showcasing land and plot opportunities near Jaipur with immersive visuals, bilingual content, and direct WhatsApp/phone inquiry buttons.
features: Immersive hero with emotional Hindi+English headlines and Call/WhatsApp CTAs
6 featured sample plots with popup detail modals on click
4 land category cards (Residential, Farm, Investment, Commercial)
Why Choose Us trust section with process steps
Sticky WhatsApp and Phone buttons always visible
Micro-interactions: hover zoom, card lift, smooth scroll, fade-in animations
